creator: rodrigo@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 202584
Upgrade net/miniupnpd to v2.1.20190210

Upgrade net/miniupnpd from v2.0.20180503 to v2.1.20190210

Changelog: http://miniupnp.free.fr/files/changelog.php?file=miniupnpd-2.1.20190210.tar.gz

Patch portinuse.c file to reflect changes in the structures xtcpcb and xinpcb returned by the kernel after r315662. The fix was inspired by changes made in usr.bin/systat/netstat.c tool.
